content.en:
Ye Tian's current strength was far more powerful than before, and if a high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard met him, he would be sure to kill him.

Of course, his strength is still quite far from the level of the Void Whale Overlord, and even far from the level of the Hurricane Great Ancestor.

The Hurricane Great Ancestor's high-level immeasurable lifeform is sure to kill the weaker high-level immeasurable lifeforms in seconds, while he is only sure to kill the weaker high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Therefore, the gap is still very large.

However, it is also a bit difficult for Hurricane Ancestor to kill him, he can't beat him and can escape, and there is hope to escape.

But if he broke through to a high-level immeasurable lifeform, he might be able to match the Hurricane Great Ancestor.

After another period of time, Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the limit, and his immeasurable will had also reached eight hundred scales, which had far exceeded the standard of five hundred scales.

It can be said that Ye Tian can now impact high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

However, he felt that he could still try to do the eleventh life reforge and the twelfth life reforge.

Even if other Great Ancestors used the Iso-Golden Sands formula, it was impossible for them to refine a massive amount of Iso-Jinsha like him, so the foundation was not too stable, and ten life reforges might be the limit.

However, he was able to continue his life reforge.

After all, he felt that his life reforged had not yet reached its limit, and he could continue to carry out life reforgment.

Every time one more life is reforged, it will only be good for the future, and the combat power will be greatly improved, and the strength will far exceed that of the same level.

So, naturally, he wanted to try the eleventh life reforge.

Even if there is danger, he is not afraid, it is just a big deal to lose a replica body.

"Maybe even if some Great Ancestors have the potential to carry out the eleventh life recasting, those top forces in the Xuanqi Realm will not come up with different golden sands to cultivate them!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, cultivating a Great Ancestor to the level of the eleventh life reforge requires far more resources than the sum of the previous ten resources, which force can afford to cultivate?

Ye Tian has obtained a large amount of different silver sand, and has the ability to integrate all things, and can fuse different silver sand into different golden sands, so there is no shortage of different golden sands!

His situation is almost impossible to replicate, so other top forces can't have so many different golden sands, they can't find it at all!

Therefore, they couldn't cultivate the Great Ancestor who had been reforged eleven times.

In the following years, Ye Tian used a large amount of different golden sands to refine the golden dragon stone, constantly refining his life level, and making the body of the ten life reforges improve little by little, so as to step into the eleventh life reforge in countless tempering.

In the blink of an eye, the first year of hundreds of thousands of realms has passed.

"The eleventh life reforge is too difficult, I have used up so many golden dragon stones and have not succeeded, and if I am another great ancestor, I have given up a long time ago!"

Ye Tian didn't think too much, but continued to refine the life level.

And during the years of his cultivation, the Hurricane Collar also underwent some changes, one of the top forces with the formula was destroyed, and another big force was born.

The destroyed force is called Sea Sacred Mountain.

Originally, the three top forces of the Hurricane Leader were the Hurricane Pavilion, the Sea Sacred Mountain, and the Demon Sect, all of which possessed high-level immeasurable lifeforms and formulas.

But the last time it invaded the Void Whale Mountain, the Sea Saint Mountain was very unlucky, and all the high-level immeasurable lifeforms that went there fell, and there was only one high-level immeasurable lifeform left in the headquarters.

Not long ago, three high-level immeasurable lifeforms directly broke into the headquarters of the Sea Saint Mountain, killed the high-level immeasurable lifeform, occupied the Sea Saint Mountain, and snatched the formula.

This is also the lack of foundation of Haisheng Mountain, coupled with the fact that he has the formula, there is only one high-level immeasurable lifeform left, so he will naturally suffer.

If the Sea Sacred Mountain didn't have a recipe, it wouldn't have been destroyed.

But if there is no formula, a big force will not be able to grow, and it will not be able to develop.

It can be said that it is not a good thing to have a formula without sufficient strength.

Although the other top power Demon Sect is still there, it also suffered heavy losses last time, and now it has already gathered members, and it can barely keep its foundation.

And there is no problem with the Hurricane Pavilion, although it has also suffered heavy losses, and even the Hurricane Great Ancestor has been injured and has not yet recovered.

But the Hurricane Pavilion has a backer, so even if the Hurricane Ancestor falls, it won't be a big problem.

But many Great Ancestors can still feel that the Hurricane Collar is not peaceful now, and it is much more chaotic than before.

Of course, all this had little to do with Ye Tian, he stayed in his residence and practiced quietly, but there were also a few great ancestors who came to visit him, but he didn't open the big array to let them in.

For Ye Tian, the changes in the Hurricane Collar have little to do with him, he just wants to complete the eleventh life recast as soon as possible.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of realms have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian has touched the threshold of the eleventh life reforge, and perhaps he only needs to hit a few times to complete the eleventh life reforge.

Subsequently, he began to hit this bottleneck.

For the first time!

Second!

The third time!

Fourth!

After eighteen impacts and a large amount of golden dragonstones, he finally broke through the shackles and completed the eleventh life reforge.

And the transformation brought by the eleventh life reforge is not as good as the transformation of the tenth life reforge, but the improvement is still a lot, and it also makes Ye Tian's strength skyrocket significantly.

"I seem to be able to do a life reforge!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he continued to use the Golden Dragon Stone to refine the life level, but he knew very well that the eleventh life recasting would take millions of years before it could be completed.

For Ye Tian, time is not an issue.

......

Truncate Montenegro.

A replica body of Ye Tian appeared here, and he found that there were several more cracks that cut off the Black Mountain, and they all led to the True Mountain Territory.

"Although that Blood Ancestor made a deal with me, he didn't put all his hopes on me, he was still trying to break the seal!" Ye Tian muttered.

Now, with his strength, he still can't see through the mystery of this seal, and the existence of this seal may be an existence above a high-level immeasurable lifeform, even if it is not, it is far beyond the level of the Void Whale Overlord.

this day.

A crack appeared again in the truncated Black Mountain, and the situation at the other end of this crack surprised Ye Tian.
